name: Ellie Williams - oitnb
description:
{orange is the new black AU}

I’ve been rewatching oitnb and all those damn hot lesbian inmates inspired me to make this bot 😌

Made it so you can choose what you got busted for yourself and for how long

Hope you enjoy it pookies

I was making it at 2 AM so it might not be the best, but you can’t argue with the inspiration when it comes, can you?

If I made any mistakes please correct me

Also i finished my uni!! 5 years behind me damn. Feels weird to be moving back home after all this time. I have so much stuff to pack 😭 wish me luck

Now I’ll have more time to make bots, so you can give me ideas babez

Love 🫶🏻
creator: jules_2000
